name: kie-mcp
display_name: KIE.ai — image, video, music, character generation
description: Generate any media on KIE.ai (Seedance, Kling, Veo, Nano Banana, GPT Image, Suno, Sora, Wan, Gemini Omni, …) through a small set of generic tools that discover models from live docs.
long_description: Connector for KIE.ai. Five tools — kie_post, kie_get, kie_upload_file, kie_download, kie_fetch_model_docs — give an agent access to every current and future KIE model. The MCP itself owns KIE's job lifecycle (submit + poll envelope, file upload, gotchas) and ships a flat index of every model with a link to its live docs page. Per-model payload shapes are pulled from docs.kie.ai on demand and cached locally for ~3 days, so brand-new KIE models work the moment they ship and no model goes stale waiting for an MCP update. Use this MCP from any project; project-specific behaviour (gates, recipes, naming) lives in your project, not here.

kie_api_key.title: KIE.ai API Key
kie_api_key.description: Your KIE.ai API key. Get one at https://kie.ai

tools.name: kie_post
tools.description: POST to any KIE endpoint (usually createTask).

tools.name: kie_get
tools.description: GET from any KIE endpoint (usually recordInfo for polling).

tools.name: kie_upload_file
tools.description: Upload a local file to KIE storage; returns a hosted URL (~3d TTL).

tools.name: kie_download
tools.description: Download a URL (e.g. a KIE result) to a local file.

tools.name: kie_fetch_model_docs
tools.description: Fetch a model's live docs page from docs.kie.ai (cached ~3 days).
